Length.description: Length of the thermal bridge in metres; only if thermal bridge code is: user defined (individual values).

PsiValue.description: Linear thermal transmittance (psi-value); only if thermal bridging is user defined individual values.

Type.description: Code to indicate a particular type of thermal bridge; only if thermal bridge code is: user defined (individual values).

CalculationReference.description: Reference to the details of the calculation of the psi-value.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
